    Genoa, seize the moment

    Organize your visit to the city with the virtual tour, discover the shops and historic workshops with their typical products in the 3D market, accumulate 'Genovini points'.

    Follow us

            

    20 years on UNESCO World Heritage Sites

    "Strade Nuove and the system of the Palazzi dei Rolli"
    were included in the World Heritage List in 2006.
    In 2026, Genoa celebrates the anniversary with a lot of events!

    Discover more

    Keep up to date with events in and around Genoa.

    Discover the city’s vibrant soul: a whirlwind of emotions awaits you. From exhibitions to festivals, exciting shows to cultural events together forming an incredibly rich mosaic. Genoa is ready to reveal its beating heart. Come and be part of a timeless adventure.

    Top events
